bestkarma-editorial.name: BestKarma Editorial
bestkarma-editorial.bio: BestKarma Editorial turns wellness and longevity research into practical guidance for everyday life.

gpt-validator.name: BestKarma Review Team
gpt-validator.bio: The BestKarma Review Team checks health claims for source quality, nuance, and alignment with editorial standards before publication.

bestkarma-review.name: BestKarma Review Team
bestkarma-review.bio: The BestKarma Review Team checks health claims for source quality, nuance, and alignment with editorial standards before publication.

paresh-chauhan.name: Paresh Chauhan
paresh-chauhan.credentials: Health research enthusiast, longevity reader, and builder of BestKarma
paresh-chauhan.bio: Paresh started BestKarma after years of reading health and longevity research and realising most of it never reaches the people who need it most — or reaches them wrapped in hype and supplement ads. He is not a doctor or scientist. He is someone who cares deeply about getting this right, which is why every article goes through a structured validation process with primary sources cited inline. BestKarma exists because he believes credible health information should be clear, accessible, and honest about what the evidence does and does not support.
